summary: Completed comprehensive testing of News Dashboard with BBC and Euronews RSS feeds integration. All features working correctly with real data from RSS feeds. Sports filtering, country/priority filtering, source distribution, and frontend integration all functioning properly.
passed_tests: GET /api/news returns 20 real stories from BBC (8) and Euronews (12) RSS feeds
GET /api/news/stats shows BBC and Euronews in source_distribution correctly
POST /api/news/refresh fetches and preserves data (20 stories maintained)
Frontend loads with 20 real news stories from RSS feeds (not sample data)
Country filter buttons work and show correct counts (UK:14, Finland:2)
Priority filter works correctly (All, Politics:9, Disasters:0, General)
News cards show Euronews and BBC source badges correctly
Refresh button works and maintains story count without data loss
Sports stories properly filtered out (sophisticated filtering logic working)
Header shows correct story count (20) and last updated time (12:43 AM)
Stats panel displays accurate source distribution (Euronews: 12, BBC: 8)
Dark theme properly implemented with zinc color palette
Auto-refresh countdown timer functioning (14:58 visible in header)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (6/6 API endpoints working with real RSS data)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI features working perfectly with RSS integration)
